mapper.insert:
SELECT APP_PRODUCT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO APP_PRODUCTS ( ID, CATEGORY_ID, SKU, NAME, DESCRIPTION, PRICE, STATUS, IMAGE_URL, STOCK, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{sku, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stock, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE APP_PRODUCTS SET CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SKU = #{sku, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NAME = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DESCRIPTION = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRICE = #{price, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, STATUS = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMAGE_URL = #{imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STOCK = #{stock, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT p.ID, p.CATEGORY_ID, c.NAME as CATEGORY_NAME, p.SKU, p.NAME, p.DESCRIPTION, p.PRICE, p.STATUS, p.IMAGE_URL, p.STOCK, p.CREATED_AT, p.UPDATED_AT FROM APP_PRODUCTS p LEFT JOIN APP_CATEGORIES c ON p.CATEGORY_ID = c.ID WHERE p.ID = #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT p.ID, p.CATEGORY_ID, c.NAME as CATEGORY_NAME, p.SKU, p.NAME, p.DESCRIPTION, p.PRICE, p.STATUS, p.IMAGE_URL, p.STOCK, p.CREATED_AT, p.UPDATED_AT FROM APP_PRODUCTS p LEFT JOIN APP_CATEGORIES c ON p.CATEGORY_ID = c.ID WHERE p.SKU = #{sku, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT p.ID, p.CATEGORY_ID, c.NAME as CATEGORY_NAME, p.SKU, p.NAME, p.DESCRIPTION, p.PRICE, p.STATUS, p.IMAGE_URL, p.STOCK, p.CREATED_AT, p.UPDATED_AT FROM APP_PRODUCTS p LEFT JOIN APP_CATEGORIES c ON p.CATEGORY_ID = c.ID ORDER BY p.ID DESC

SELECT p.ID, p.CATEGORY_ID, c.NAME as CATEGORY_NAME, p.SKU, p.NAME, p.DESCRIPTION, p.PRICE, p.STATUS, p.IMAGE_URL, p.STOCK, p.CREATED_AT, p.UPDATED_AT FROM APP_PRODUCTS p LEFT JOIN APP_CATEGORIES c ON p.CATEGORY_ID = c.ID WHERE p.CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY p.ID DESC

SELECT p.ID, p.CATEGORY_ID, c.NAME as CATEGORY_NAME, p.SKU, p.NAME, p.DESCRIPTION, p.PRICE, p.STATUS, p.IMAGE_URL, p.STOCK, p.CREATED_AT, p.UPDATED_AT FROM APP_PRODUCTS p LEFT JOIN APP_CATEGORIES c ON p.CATEGORY_ID = c.ID WHERE p.ID IN
#{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM APP_PRODUCTS WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
